reviews.comment:
15 Minutos esperando en la calle para que nos dejen ingresar a cargar combustible y nadie que nos informe que pasaba...Solo había una persona de seguridad cortando el ingreso y los playeros desaparecieron...Finalmente tuve que ir a otra Estación...Lamentable.

(Translated by Google)
We waited 15 minutes on the street to be allowed to enter and refuel, and no one told us what was happening... There was only one security guard blocking the entrance, and the attendants disappeared... I finally had to go to another station... Disappointing.
